title: aidia rubens
intro: Aidia rubens, also known as the red mangostana or purple mangosteen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Aidia rubens include its ability to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Aidia rubens include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
